name: Benefic in 8th House — Smooth Inheritance
description: Natural benefics (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury, Moon) in the 8th house indicate smooth inheritance, hidden wealth surfacing easily, and legacy matters resolving without dispute.

source_text.quote: Benefic planets in the 8th house ensure that inheritance flows smoothly to the native. Hidden wealth surfaces without effort, and legacy matters resolve peacefully.

all_of: One or more natural benefics (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury, waxing Moon) are placed in the 8th house from Lagna
any_of: No malefic aspect on the 8th house benefic

interpretation.meaning: Benefics in 8th = protected inheritance axis. The native receives inheritance smoothly, without legal battles or family disputes. Hidden assets and insurance claims resolve favorably.

metadata.notes: Structural pattern. Jupiter in 8th is strongest for smooth inheritance. Venus in 8th = luxury inheritance.

name: 8th House Hostile Drishti — Property Disputes
description: Malefic aspects (Saturn, Mars, Rahu) on the 8th house or its lord indicate contested inheritance, legal disputes over property, and difficult legacy resolution.

source_text.quote: When malefics aspect the 8th house or its lord, inheritance is contested. The native faces litigation, disputes with relatives over ancestral property, and hidden enemies block legacy.

all_of: Natural malefics (Saturn, Mars, Rahu) aspect or occupy the 8th house

interpretation.meaning: Hostile aspects on the 8th house corrupt the inheritance axis. Disputes, litigation, family feuds over property, and contested wills are indicated. Legal intervention is likely required.

metadata.notes: Challenging pattern. Saturn aspect = delay. Mars aspect = aggression. Rahu aspect = deception.

name: Strong 4th House — Inherited Land & Ancestral Property
description: A strong 4th house (lord well-placed, benefic aspects, no malefic affliction) indicates the native will inherit land, ancestral property, and enjoy immovable assets from family.

source_text.quote: When the 4th house and its lord are strong with benefic influence, the native enjoys ancestral property, inherits fertile land, and lives in comfort with multiple homes.

all_of: 4th lord is in kendra (1,4,7,10) or trikona (1,5,9)
4th house receives benefic aspect (Jupiter or Venus)
any_of: 4th lord is in own sign or exalted

interpretation.meaning: Strong 4th house = strong property axis. The native inherits ancestral land, maintains family property, and accumulates immovable assets throughout life. Multiple properties indicated.

metadata.notes: The 4th house is the PRIMARY property indicator. Strong 4th = lifetime property blessings.

name: Strong 2nd House — Family Money & Accumulated Wealth
description: A strong 2nd house (benefics, strong lord, Jupiter aspect) indicates inherited family wealth, gold, gems, savings, and accumulated movable assets from ancestral sources.

source_text.quote: When the 2nd house is strong with benefic planets and its lord well-placed, the native inherits family gold, gems, and accumulated wealth. The family treasury flows to them.

all_of: 2nd house receives benefic aspect or occupation

interpretation.meaning: Strong 2nd house = rich family lineage and inherited movable wealth. Gold, jewelry, bank deposits, and family business assets flow to the native. The family treasury is accessible.

metadata.notes: 2nd house = family money (movable). Different from 4th (immovable). Gold, gems, FDs, savings.

name: 12th House Activation — Paternal Property Transfer
description: The 12th house represents 'father's loss' (4th from 9th = father's property, 12th from lagna = what comes without personal effort). Active 12th = paternal property flows to native.

source_text.quote: The 12th house, being the 4th from the 9th, represents father's property. When its lord is strong or connected to the 4th lord, paternal property transfers to the native without effort.

all_of: 12th lord is connected to 4th lord or 9th lord
any_of: 12th lord in 4th house (paternal property in own home)

interpretation.meaning: 12th house as 4th-from-9th represents father's property. When active and connected to property houses, paternal property transfers effortlessly. Distant property or foreign real estate also indicated.

metadata.notes: 12th = 4th from 9th. Father's property axis. Also indicates foreign property or distant land.

name: 3rd House Activation — Sudden Windfalls & Brother's Property
description: The 3rd house (effort, siblings, courage) when strongly activated indicates sudden property windfalls, gains through siblings, or unexpected property through personal initiative.

source_text.quote: A strong 3rd house with its lord in wealth houses brings sudden gains through personal courage, brother's assistance, and unexpected property through bold initiative.

all_of: 3rd lord is connected to wealth houses (2, 4, 8, 11)
any_of: Mars (3rd karaka) is strong and in property house

interpretation.meaning: 3rd house activation for property indicates sudden gains through personal courage, sibling support, or bold initiative. Unexpected property through brothers/sisters or through daring action.

metadata.notes: 3rd house = personal effort/siblings. Property through initiative rather than passive inheritance.

name: Mars Conjunct 4th Lord — Land Power & Real Estate Dominance
description: Mars (land karaka) conjunct the 4th lord creates a powerful land yoga. The native acquires multiple properties, dominates real estate, and inherits large tracts of land.

source_text.quote: When Mars, the karaka for land, conjoins the lord of the 4th house, the native becomes a lord of land and property. Multiple estates, ancestral farms, and immovable wealth accumulate.

all_of: Mars is conjunct the 4th lord (same sign)
any_of: Conjunction is in a kendra or trikona
Both Mars and 4th lord are dignified

interpretation.meaning: Mars (land) with 4th lord (property house) = powerful land yoga. The native inherits and acquires multiple properties. Real estate dominance through ancestral and personal accumulation.

metadata.notes: Mars = land karaka. With 4th lord = amplified. One of the strongest land yogas in Jyotish.

name: Jupiter Aspects 4th & 8th — Wealth Protection & Expansion
description: Jupiter's aspect on both the 4th (property) and 8th (inheritance) houses creates a protected property axis. Inheritance is smooth, property grows, and wealth is shielded from loss.

source_text.quote: When Jupiter aspects both the 4th and 8th houses, the native's property is protected by dharma. Inheritance flows without dispute, and wealth expands through righteous accumulation.

all_of: Jupiter also aspects or is placed in the 8th house
any_of: Jupiter is in own sign or exalted
Jupiter is not combust or retrograde
4th and 8th lords are friendly to Jupiter

interpretation.meaning: Jupiter protecting both property (4th) and inheritance (8th) creates a dharmic wealth shield. Property expands naturally, inheritance is smooth, and accumulated wealth is protected from legal challenges.

metadata.notes: Jupiter's dual aspect on 4th and 8th = complete property protection. Rare but powerful.

name: Saturn in 4th — Ancestral Structures & Old Property
description: Saturn in the 4th house indicates gains through old structures, ancestral buildings, agricultural land, and property that has been in the family for generations.

source_text.quote: Saturn in the 4th house gives the native old ancestral buildings, agricultural land, and property that endures through time. The gains are slow but permanent.

all_of: Saturn is placed in the 4th house from Lagna
any_of: Saturn is in own sign (Capricorn/Aquarius) in 4th
4th lord is strong despite Saturn's presence

interpretation.meaning: Saturn in 4th gives old, ancestral, enduring property. Buildings, farms, and land that have been in the family. The property may need maintenance but is permanent. Agricultural income from ancestral land.

metadata.notes: Saturn in 4th = old property. May delay happiness but gives permanent ancestral assets.
